name: Prune schema-level template artifacts and non-PRD seeded entity types
motivation: The schema currently seeds template entity types and task-queue views for coding/analysis/code-cleanup agents that are not part of the PRD domain model, causing long-term data model drift.
intended_experience: Database schema aligns with PRD entities and workflows only, and includes explicit safe migration steps for removing template artifacts without data loss surprises.
constraints: Use additive-safe migration strategy first (audit/backup/check), then destructive removal with explicit guards.
Do not alter PRD-required tables or state-machine structures.
Document operator migration steps and rollback guidance.
